name: Italian-Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1 1/3 cups of Salad Oil into a blender container.
2. Add 1/2 cup of Vinegar to the oil.
3. Incorporate 1/4 cup of grated Parmesan Cheese.
4. Stir in 1 tablespoon of Sugar.
5. Gradually add 2 teaspoons of Salt and 1 teaspoon of Celery Salt.
6. Include 1/2 teaspoon of White Pepper, 1/2 teaspoon of Dry Mustard, and 1/4 teaspoon of Paprika.
7. Add 1 minced garlic clove to the mixture.
8. Blend all ingredients until fully combined.
9. Transfer the dressing to a container and chill before serving.
Makes 1 3/4 cups.
